title: Union Health Ministry Launches Integrated Training for Primary Healthcare Teams
summary: Union Minister Jagat Prakash Nadda launched a competency-driven Integrated Training framework for primary healthcare teams. This initiative shifts from fragmented capacity building to a structured model, empowering the frontline workforce. Notably, it supports women who comprise over 70% of the workforce, including ASHAs, ANMs, and CHOs, to ensure high-quality, people-centered care and last-mile delivery for Viksit Bharat @2047.

title: Launch of JANANI Digital Platform for Maternal and Child Healthcare
summary: The Ministry of Health and Family Welfare introduced JANANI, a digital platform for longitudinal health records of women of reproductive age. Upgrading the RCH portal, it has already achieved 1.34 crore beneficiary registrations, 30 lakh pregnant women registrations, and 30 lakh MCH cards. The system uses QR-enabled cards to track antenatal, postnatal, and newborn care, ensuring seamless continuity of care.

title: Ministry Releases RBSK 2.0 Guidelines for Enhanced Child Health
summary: The Ministry of Health and Family Welfare released RBSK 2.0 Guidelines, expanding the flagship child health screening programme. The updated framework broadens the 4Ds approach—Defects at Birth, Diseases, Deficiencies, and Developmental Delays—to include mental health and non-communicable diseases. It provides a comprehensive continuum of care for children from birth to 18 years, emphasizing digitalization and holistic growth development.

title: National Summit on Innovation and Inclusivity Concludes
summary: The two-day National Summit concluded with a focus on the 17th Common Review Mission findings to drive evidence-based reforms under the National Health Mission. Key discussions highlighted progress in Ayushman Arogya Mandirs, digital health adoption, and primary healthcare expansion. The event emphasized optimizing human resources and improving drug availability to enhance healthcare outreach and inclusivity across India's underserved rural areas.
